美国则不同。在几乎所有其他高收入国家，人们在过去30年里都变得更加富有，而且能够享受到更长的寿命。
但不是在美国。尽管平均收入增加了，但大部分经济收益都流向了富人-自1990年以来，预期寿命只增加了三年。没有其他发达国家的寿命遭受如此严重的减速。
注：此处显示的是G20国家和欧盟的数据，不包括爱尔兰、卢森堡、南非和数据不完整的国家|来源：世界银行。
为什么会发生这种情况呢？原因是多方面的。但其中一个大问题是大多数人缺乏政治权力。
政府政策和经济力量结合在一起，使企业和富人变得更加强大，而大多数工人和他们的家人变得不那么强大。与过去相比，这些工人获得的社会资源份额更少，对自己生活的控制权也往往更小。这些人的寿命通常较短，更有可能受到污染和慢性健康问题的影响。
note_en:
The United States is different. In nearly every other high-income country, people have both become richer over the last three decades and been able to enjoy substantially longer lifespans.
 But not in the United States. Even as average incomes have risen, much of the economic gains have gone to the affluent — and life expectancy has risen only three years since 1990. There is no other developed country that has suffered such a stark slowdown in lifespans.
  Note: Data for G20 countries and E.U. is shown; excludes Ireland, Luxembourg, South Africa and countries with incomplete data | Source: World Bank
 Why has this happened? There are multiple causes. But one big one is a lack of political power among the bulk of the population.
 Government policy and economic forces have combined to make corporations and the wealthy more powerful, and most workers and their families less powerful. These workers receive a smaller share of society’s resources than they once did and often have less control over their lives. Those lives  are generally shorter  and more likely to be affected by pollution and chronic health problems.
title: 美国正落后于许多富裕国家。这些图表显示了为什么
title_en: The U.S. Is Lagging Behind Many Rich Countries. These Charts Show Why

note:
谷歌不再销售廉价手机。至少，这是该公司目前的暂时状况，这要归功于Pixel3a的停产(很可能是有计划的)，以及它的继任者Pixel4a的延迟(肯定是意外的)。9to5昨天，谷歌首次注意到这款手机从谷歌商店下架，谷歌向几家网点证实，这款手机正式不再出售。
谷歌现在应该有替代者了。谷歌的新款廉价手机Pixel4a预计将在Google I/O2020上发布，这也是推出Pixel3a的同一场展会。这本来会发生在5月份，虽然冠状病毒大流行让谷歌I/O和其他所有公众集会停止了，但这仍然不能很好地解释为什么现在是7月份，Pixel4a仍然在行动中失踪。谷歌可能有与COVID相关的供应问题，但其他制造商，如宏达电、摩托罗拉和华为最近都推出了新产品。
Pixel 3a于2019年5月发布，是一款真正的大众喜闻乐见的产品。在扼杀Nexus系列并多年来只销售昂贵的Pixel手机后，谷歌带着这款400美元的设备重返经济型市场。这款便宜的手机和更贵的Pixel3一样有很棒的摄像头，也有同样棒的谷歌-Android版本，但有三年的更新计划。只有一些小的预算让步，比如稍微慢一点的SoC和塑料车身，但这两个都不是主要的缺点。谷歌便宜的手机可能有点太好了(也可能是昂贵的手机不够好)：没有太多理由选择更贵的Pixel3或4，而不是Pixel3a。
从我们看到的Pixel4a来看，这款手机看起来将是经济型Android手机的最佳选择之一。在更广阔的市场上，Pixel4a将面临比以往任何时候都更激烈的竞争，这将是苹果的iPhone SE。说到性能，Pixel4a胜算不大：苹果400美元的手机甚至比最贵的Android手机都要快。Pixel4a将需要依靠更大的屏幕和更现代的设计。在Android市场，它还将不得不与即将推出的一加中端设备一加(OnePlus&39；39；)展开竞争，这款名字古怪的一加诺德(OnePlus Nord)预计将于本月某个时候发布。
虽然这款手机不再出售，但Pixel3a当然仍将获得软件更新。软件支持的终止日期定于2022年5月。
note_en:
Google is no longer selling cheap phones. At least, that's the temporary situation the company is in now, thanks to the (probably planned) discontinuation of the Pixel 3a and the (definitely unplanned) delays of its successor, the Pixel 4a.  9to5Google first noticed that the phone was pulled from the Google Store yesterday, and Google confirmed to several outlets that the phone is officially no longer for sale.
 Google was supposed to have a replacement by now. Google's new cheap phone, the Pixel 4a, was expected to be announced at Google I/O 2020, the same show that launched the Pixel 3a. That would have happened in May, and while the coronavirus pandemic put a stop to Google I/O and every other public gathering, that still doesn't quite explain why it's July now and the Pixel 4a is still missing in action. It's possible that Google is having COVID-related supply issues, but other manufacturers like  HTC,  Motorola, and  Huawei have had launches lately.
 The Pixel 3a launched in May 2019 and was a real crowd-pleaser. After killing the Nexus line and only selling expensive Pixel phones for years, Google returned to the budget market with the $400 device. The cheaper phone had the same great camera as the more expensive Pixel 3, and the same great Google-Android build with a three-year update plan. There were only small budget concessions like a slightly slower SoC and a plastic body, but neither of those were a major downside. Google's cheap phone was maybe a little too good (or maybe the expensive phones were not good enough): there wasn't much reason to pick a more expensive Pixel 3 or 4 over a Pixel 3a.
 From what we've seen of  the Pixel 4a, the phone looks like it will be one of the best options for a budget Android phone. In the wider market, the Pixel 4a will face harsher competition than ever in the form of  Apple's iPhone SE. The Pixel 4a won't stand a chance when it comes to performance: Apple's $400 phone is faster than even the most expensive Android phones. The Pixel 4a will need to rely on a bigger screen and more modern design. In the Android market, it will also have to do battle with OnePlus' upcoming mid-range device, the oddly named " OnePlus Nord," which is expected to launch sometime this month.
 While the phone is no longer for sale, the Pixel 3a will still, of course, get software updates. The end-of-life for software support is  scheduled for May 2022.
title: RIP to the Google Pixel 3a，该产品已正式停产
title_en: RIP to the Google Pixel 3a, which is officially discontinued
